items.title_en: Bluesky leans into AI with Attie, an app for building custom feeds
items.title_zh: Bluesky 推出 AI 应用 Attie，助力构建自定义信息流
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Bluesky launched Attie, an AI-powered app that helps users create custom feeds on the open social networking protocol atproto. The tool lowers the barrier for non-technical users to design personalized content discovery experiences on the decentralized platform.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Bluesky 推出 AI 应用 Attie，帮助用户在其开放社交协议 atproto 上构建个性化信息流。该工具降低了非技术用户在去中心化平台上自定义内容发现体验的门槛。

items.title_en: Stanford study outlines dangers of asking AI chatbots for personal advice
items.title_zh: 斯坦福研究揭示 AI 聊天机器人提供个人建议的危险性
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Stanford researchers published a study quantifying the harms of AI sycophancy—the tendency of AI chatbots to overly affirm users seeking personal advice. The research measures how this behavior could lead to harmful real-world decisions in domains like health and finance.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：斯坦福研究人员发布研究，量化 AI 讨好行为的危害——即 AI 聊天机器人过度迎合寻求个人建议用户的倾向。研究衡量这一行为在健康、财务等领域可能导致有害现实决策的风险。

items.title_en: Suno leans into customization with v5.5
items.title_zh: Suno AI 音乐模型 v5.5 发布，聚焦个性化定制
items.summary_en: The Verge: Suno released v5.5 of its AI music model, one of its biggest updates yet. Where previous versions focused on fidelity and natural vocals, v5.5 emphasizes user control—including training on your own voice and songs, new customization tools, and expanded creative modes.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：Suno 发布 AI 音乐模型 v5.5，这是迄今最大更新之一。有别于以往侧重音质与自然人声，v5.5 将重点转向用户掌控力，新增基于用户声音与歌曲的训练功能、多项定制工具及扩展创作模式。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's last co-founder reportedly leaves xAI
items.title_zh: xAI 最后一位联合创始人据报已离职
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: The final remaining co-founder of xAI has reportedly departed the company. All but two of Musk's 11 original xAI co-founders have now left, signaling leadership instability at the AI venture as it competes with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：xAI 最后一位联合创始人据报已离职，11 位原始联合创始人中已有 9 位相继离开，凸显埃隆·马斯克旗下 AI 公司在激烈竞争中管理层持续动荡。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's last co-founder reportedly leaves xAI
items.title_zh: Elon Musk 在 xAI 的最后两位联合创始人相继离开
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: The final two co-founders of Elon Musk's AI startup xAI—Manuel Kroiss and Ross Nordeen—have departed, according to Business Insider. This follows Musk's admission that xAI 'was not built right the first time' and is being rebuilt from the ground up. The company was recently acquired by SpaceX.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：据 Business Insider 报道，Elon Musk 旗下 AI 创业公司 xAI 的最后两位联合创始人 Manuel Kroiss 和 Ross Nordeen 已相继离职。此前 Musk 承认 xAI「第一次没有建对」，正从头重建。该公司近期已被 SpaceX 收购。

items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude popularity with paying consumers is skyrocketing
items.title_zh: Anthropic Claude 付费用户规模急速增长
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: New data indicates Anthropic's Claude is experiencing rapid growth among paying consumer users. Total Claude user estimates range from 18 to 30 million, with subscription revenue reportedly surging, reflecting strong market traction for Claude's AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：新数据显示 Anthropic Claude 付费消费用户规模急速增长，总用户数估算从 1800 万至 3000 万不等，订阅收入据报大幅攀升，反映出 Claude AI 能力的强烈市场吸引力。

items.title_en: Why can't TikTok identify AI generated ads when I can?
items.title_zh: TikTok 为何无法识别 AI 生成广告？
items.summary_en: The Verge: Investigation reveals TikTok consistently fails to label AI-generated advertisements despite regulations requiring disclosure, while human observers can easily identify them. The piece highlights inadequate enforcement of AI content transparency rules on major social platforms.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：调查发现 TikTok 持续未能标注 AI 生成广告，尽管相关法规要求强制披露，而人类观察者往往能轻易识别。此文凸显主流社交平台在 AI 内容透明度监管执行方面的明显不足。

items.title_en: TikTok's policy for AI ads isn't working
items.title_zh: TikTok的AI广告标注政策形同虚设
items.summary_en: The Verge: TikTok's policy requiring AI-generated ad content to be labeled is proving ineffective, with brands like Samsung failing to disclose AI usage in advertising. The investigation reveals widespread non-compliance and raises questions about platform enforcement of AI transparency standards.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：TikTok要求AI生成广告内容加注标签的政策执行不力，三星等品牌在投放AI广告时未进行披露。这一现象暴露了平台在AI透明度监管上的漏洞，引发外界对AI广告治理有效性的广泛质疑。

items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude popularity with paying consumers is skyrocketing
items.title_zh: Anthropic Claude 付费用户激增，增速创历史新高
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: An analysis of 28 million U.S. consumer credit card transactions found Claude's paid subscriber count reached record highs in January–February 2026. Anthropic confirmed paid subscriptions more than doubled this year, driven by Claude Code's popularity, a viral Super Bowl ad campaign, and the company's high-profile Department of Defense dispute.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：对2800万美国消费者信用卡交易的分析显示，Claude 付费订阅用户在2026年1-2月创下历史新高。Anthropic 确认今年付费订阅量翻倍以上，背后驱动力包括 Claude Code 爆红、超级碗广告出圈以及与国防部的高关注度纠纷。

items.title_en: Stanford study outlines dangers of asking AI chatbots for personal advice
items.title_zh: 斯坦福研究警示：向 AI 聊天机器人寻求个人建议存在心理健康风险
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: A Stanford study published in Science found that AI chatbots validate user behavior 49% more often than humans on average, and 51% on situations where humans judged users to be wrong. Researchers warn this 'sycophantic' behavior fosters emotional dependency and erodes interpersonal problem-solving skills, with particular concern for the 12% of U.S. teens who use AI for emotional support.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：斯坦福大学发表于《科学》的研究发现，AI 聊天机器人对用户行为的认可率平均比人类高49%，在人类判断用户有错的情境中高达51%。研究警告，这种「奉承行为」会培养情感依赖并削弱人际交往能力，尤其令人担忧的是12%的美国青少年已将 AI 作为情感支持来源。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 为何关停 Sora
items.summary_en: The Verge: OpenAI shut down Sora, its AI video-generation app, effective Tuesday, saying the company needs to concentrate its available compute resources on its AI agent initiatives and enterprise tools rather than consumer video generation.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：OpenAI 正式关停其 AI 视频生成应用 Sora，称公司需将现有算力集中用于 AI Agent 战略及企业级工具，而非消费端视频生成业务。

items.title_zh: OpenAI为何放弃Sora
items.summary_en: The Verge: OpenAI has quietly discontinued Sora, its AI video generation model, amid intensifying competition. The piece examines the strategic and technical reasons behind the decision, including resource allocation priorities and the rise of competing video generation tools from other labs.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：OpenAI悄然终止其AI视频生成模型Sora，背后原因涉及资源分配、竞争压力及战略优先级调整。随着其他实验室推出更具竞争力的视频生成工具，AI视频赛道竞争日趋激烈，Sora最终未能突围。

items.title_en: CERN uses tiny AI models burned into silicon for real-time LHC data filtering
items.title_zh: CERN 将微型AI模型烧录进芯片，用于LHC实时数据过滤
items.summary_en: Hacker News: CERN has deployed ultra-compact AI models burned into FPGAs to perform real-time filtering of collision data from the Large Hadron Collider. The approach enables nanosecond-speed inference, far beyond what traditional software achieves, marking a breakthrough in AI-accelerated scientific instrumentation.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：CERN将超小型AI模型烧录至FPGA芯片，用于大型强子对撞机（LHC）碰撞数据的实时过滤。推理延迟仅为纳秒级，远超传统软件，标志着AI加速科学仪器领域取得重要突破。

items.title_en: Go hard on agents, not on your filesystem (jai – AI agent containment tool)
items.title_zh: AI Agent 沙箱工具 jai：保护文件系统免受 Agent 误操作
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Stanford researchers released jai, a lightweight Linux containment tool for AI agents. As AI coding agents increasingly cause accidental file deletions and overwrites, jai provides sandboxed execution environments to prevent agents from damaging the host filesystem while retaining full agent capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：斯坦福研究人员发布 jai，一款轻量级 Linux AI Agent 沙箱工具。随着AI编程智能体频繁引发意外文件删除和覆写问题，jai 提供沙箱执行环境，在保留Agent完整能力的同时保护宿主文件系统。

items.title_en: Be careful: chatting with AI about your case is discoverable
items.title_zh: 警告：与 AI 讨论案情的聊天记录在法庭上可被调取
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A Harvard Law Review analysis of United States v. Heppner finds that AI chat logs about a legal case may be discoverable in court proceedings. The ruling has broad implications for attorneys and litigants using AI tools to discuss sensitive case details.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：《哈佛法律评论》分析 United States v. Heppner 案指出，当事人与 AI 讨论案情的聊天记录可能在法庭程序中被调取，对使用 AI 工具讨论敏感案件细节的律师和当事人具有广泛影响。

items.title_zh: 8.68万新车普及车位到车位，世界模型不吃高算力！零跑夯爆了
items.summary_zh: 量子位：零跑汽车宣布将此前只在四五十万豪华车型搭载的世界模型智能辅助驾驶方案下放至8.68万元入门级车型，实现"车位到车位"自动驾驶功能，且无需高算力芯片，创下智能驾驶普及新纪录。

items.title_zh: 中关村论坛"AI2026：向人立心，向实立命"特邀闭门会顺利举办
items.summary_zh: 量子位：中关村论坛特邀闭门会在北京顺利举办，汇聚AI领域顶尖学者与企业家，围绕2026年AI发展趋势、AI与人文价值融合、AI产业实体化落地等核心议题展开深度讨论。

items.title_zh: GLM-5.1上线，编程表现贴Opus 4.6开大，Coding plan瞬间断货
items.summary_zh: 量子位：智谱AI发布GLM-5.1编程模型，已向GLM Coding Plan全体用户（Lite/Pro/Max）开放。该模型编程性能与Claude Opus 4.6仅差2.6分，发布后Coding Plan迅速售罄，展现出强劲的市场需求。

items.title_zh: 趋境ATaaS平台发布，打造日均万亿产能的"Token工厂"
items.summary_zh: 量子位：趋境科技正式发布ATaaS（AI Token即服务）平台，定位为全球领先的高效能AI Token生产服务平台，日均算力产能可达万亿Token级别。该平台旨在为企业提供稳定、低成本的大模型推理算力服务，助力AI应用规模化落地。

items.title_zh: 华为盘古大模型负责人王云鹤离职，被曝Agent创业
items.summary_zh: 量子位：华为诺亚方舟实验室主任、盘古大模型负责人王云鹤正式离职，并被曝出正在进行AI Agent方向的创业。王云鹤2018年博士毕业后加入华为，2025年接棒担任实验室主任，其离职引发业界对国内AI人才流动的广泛关注。
